title: An Ordinance adopting and further strengthening Republic Act 9439 entitled " An Act Prohibiting the Detention of Patients in Hospitals and Medical Clinics on Grounds of Nonpayment of Hospital Bills or Medical Expenses " and its implementing and regulations for local implementation in the Municipality of Los Baños, Province of Laguna, which shall be known as the " Anti-Hospital Detention for Nonpayment of Hospital Bills and Medical Expenses Ordinance.'
